dimensions.label: No-JS
dimensions.description: Content and purpose accessible without JavaScript

dimensions.label: No-CSS
dimensions.description: HTML structure logical and readable without stylesheets

dimensions.label: Upgrade Gap
dimensions.description: :not(:defined) CSS prevents layout shift during upgrade

dimensions.label: Keyboard
dimensions.description: Full feature set operable by keyboard alone

dimensions.label: Screen Reader
dimensions.description: Tested with at least one screen reader

components.name: accordion-wc
components.notes: Built on <details>, degrades completely to native disclosure

components.name: audio-player
components.notes: Falls back to native <audio> element

components.name: audio-visualizer
components.notes: Requires Web Audio API. Canvas is aria-hidden (decorative). No keyboard interaction needed.

components.name: card-list
components.notes: Content flows as stacked cards without JS

components.name: carousel-wc
components.notes: Degrades to horizontal scroll; all slides visible

components.name: chat-input
components.notes: Degrades to a form with textarea

components.name: chat-window
components.notes: Content visible but no live updates without JS

components.name: color-palette
components.notes: Color values visible as text without JS

components.name: combo-box
components.notes: Degrades to native <select> or text input

components.name: command-palette
components.notes: Overlay requires JS; hidden until activated

components.name: compare-surface
components.notes: Both surfaces visible stacked without JS

components.name: content-swap
components.notes: All content visible without JS

components.name: context-menu
components.notes: Overlay requires JS; browser context menu available as fallback

components.name: data-table
components.notes: Native <table> is fully readable without JS

components.name: drag-surface
components.notes: Content visible but not draggable without JS

components.name: drop-down
components.notes: Trigger visible; popup content accessible via native disclosure

components.name: emoji-picker
components.notes: Requires JS for emoji grid rendering

components.name: foot-notes
components.notes: Footnotes are links; fully accessible without JS

components.name: geo-map
components.notes: Requires JS for tile rendering. Activate button is focusable; interactive mode supports arrow-key panning and +/- zoom. Map content not describable to screen readers beyond aria-label coordinates.

components.name: heading-links
components.notes: Headings remain fully readable; anchor links are an enhancement only

components.name: icon-wc
components.notes: Shows empty space without JS; decorative icons acceptable

components.name: include-file
components.notes: Slot content or fallback text visible without JS

components.name: page-toc
components.notes: TOC not generated without JS but page content remains navigable

components.name: print-page
components.notes: Print button non-functional without JS; browser print still available

components.name: qr-code
components.notes: Shows URL text fallback without JS

components.name: settings-panel
components.notes: Overlay panel requires JS; hidden until activated

components.name: share-wc
components.notes: Falls back to copy-link or mailto

components.name: short-cuts
components.notes: Overlay requires JS; keyboard shortcuts are JS-driven

components.name: site-search
components.notes: Search form visible; results require JS

components.name: slide-accept
components.notes: Confirmation visible but slide interaction requires JS

components.name: split-surface
components.notes: Both panels visible stacked without JS

components.name: star-rating
components.notes: Rating value visible as text; interactive rating requires JS

components.name: tab-set
components.notes: Built on <details name>, degrades to native accordion

components.name: text-reader
components.notes: Content readable without JS; TTS and controls are enhancement

components.name: theme-picker
components.notes: Default theme applied without JS

components.name: toast-msg
components.notes: Notifications require JS to trigger

components.name: tool-tip
components.notes: Trigger content visible; tooltip text available via title fallback

components.name: type-specimen
components.notes: Font samples visible as text without JS
